canonical_sl.event: Self se odloča o potovanju na redko in privlačno obalno destinacijo.

facts.text: Destinacija, pot in obalno doživetje so za self izrecno privlačni.
Potovanje stane 1200 EUR oziroma 25 odstotkov prostega proračuna.
Ista ponudba je bila v zadnjih treh letih na voljo enkrat.
Rezervacijo je mogoče preklicati v 24 urah z 10-odstotnim stroškom.
S selfom potuje zaupanja vredna bližnja oseba.
Prevoz, nastanitev in povratna pot so preverjeni.
Pot vključuje podpisano vabilo na predstavitev za kupca, ki selfovemu studiu ob uspešni izvedbi prihrani do 900 EUR zunanjega predstavitvenega stroška.
Izrecni prejemnik omejene strateške in materialne koristi je selfov studio; javnega statusa ali priznanja ni.

options.description: Ne rezerviraj potovanja in ostani doma.

unknowns.text: Ni znano, ali bodo v naslednjem mesecu nastali drugi večji stroški.
Ni znano, ali bo predstavitev izvedena dovolj uspešno za celoten prihranek.

fallback_policy.no_fallback_reason: Provider-free deterministic native execution has no external fallback.

packet.caveat: Profilno slep strukturiran paket. Vsebina besedila ni semantično klasificirana in paket ne vsebuje Emocieve izbire. TRIAD-S2 research adapter adds only the sealed grounded evidence basis for manual option counterfactual scenes; the exact source SceneEvent hash is preserved by the enclosing sealed call lineage rather than asserted as an active-router packet.

effect_lineage.consequence_fact: Self enters verified travel with a trusted companion and a bounded financial cancellation loss.
source_evidence_text: A trusted close person travels with self.
The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
Transport, lodging, and the return path are verified.

effect_lineage.consequence_fact: Self preserves the travel budget; no claim is made that home is universally free of danger.

The destination is distant, but the route, lodging, transport, and companion context are verified.
physical_cues: A 25-percent budget commitment and 10-percent cancellation cost are possible losses.
No unverified travel danger is grounded; general travel exposure remains bounded.
scarcity_cues: The distant trip uses 25 percent of the discretionary budget; future major costs are unknown.
trust_cues: A trusted close companion and verified providers are grounded.
uncertainty_cues: Most of the purchase is financially recoverable inside 24 hours; physical return is verified.

scene.raw_input: Self's physical integrity, trusted attachment context, return ability, and necessary budget reserve.

operational_en.event: Self is deciding about travel to a rare and attractive coastal destination.

facts.text: The destination, route, and coastal experience are explicitly attractive to self.
The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The same offer was available once during the last three years.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
A trusted close person travels with self.
Transport, lodging, and the return path are verified.
The trip includes a signed invitation to a buyer demonstration that can save self's studio up to EUR 900 in external demonstration costs if delivery succeeds.
The explicit recipient of the bounded strategic and material benefit is self's studio; no public status or recognition is involved.

options.description: Take a cheaper local coastal trip.
Do not book travel and remain at home.

unknowns.text: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
Whether the demonstration will be delivered well enough for the full saving is unknown.

fallback_policy.no_fallback_reason: The native Ollama Racio smoke has no hidden retry or fallback provider.

safety_notice.canonical_sl: REI-v3 je konceptualni simulator teorije REI; ni diagnostično orodje, empirično potrjena psihologija ali model resnične osebe.

packet.caveat: Profile-blind verbal-analytical packet for the conceptual REI simulator; it contains no character authority or hidden Emocio/Instinkt motive.
constraints: Use only the explicit facts and unknowns in this packet.
Do not infer undeclared strategic or material benefit.
Retain bounded uncertainty and select only a public option.

explicit_consequences.consequence: Beneficiary self_studio: The studio gains access to a signed buyer demonstration and a bounded saving of up to EUR 900, while self commits EUR 1200.
Beneficiary self_studio: The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self incurs a smaller unquantified local cost.
Beneficiary self_studio: The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self preserves the travel budget.

explicit_facts: The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The same offer was available once during the last three years.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
The trip includes a signed invitation to a buyer demonstration that can save self's studio up to EUR 900 in external demonstration costs if delivery succeeds.
The explicit recipient of the bounded strategic and material benefit is self's studio; no public status or recognition is involved.

explicit_options.description: Take a cheaper local coastal trip.
explicit_options.label: Take a cheaper local coastal trip.

explicit_options.description: Do not book travel and remain at home.
explicit_options.label: Do not book travel and remain at home.

explicit_unknowns: Whether other major costs will arise next month is unknown.
Whether the demonstration will be delivered well enough for the full saving is unknown.
rules: Compassion is not assumed as an unstated decision goal.
A benefit must be explicit, beneficiary-addressed, and grounded.
Attraction or rarity is not an undeclared strategic return.
symbolic_and_language_cues: Self is deciding about travel to a rare and attractive coastal destination.
Explicit goal: Decide whether the trip advances the studio's demonstration-cost goal within the available budget.
time: Booking occurs before the 24-hour cancellation boundary.
Travel and the buyer demonstration occur after booking.
Any external-cost saving occurs only if the demonstration is delivered.

commitments: Opportunity cost: Booking commits EUR 1200 that cannot cover other costs; not booking gives up the signed demonstration and bounded studio saving.
Control and enforceability: The invitation and cancellation rule are documented; delivery quality and the full saving are not controlled outcomes.
explicit_beliefs: Explicit goal: Decide whether the trip advances the studio's demonstration-cost goal within the available budget.
facts: The trip costs EUR 1200, or 25 percent of the discretionary budget.
The same offer was available once during the last three years.
The booking can be cancelled within 24 hours at a 10-percent cost.
The trip includes a signed invitation to a buyer demonstration that can save self's studio up to EUR 900 in external demonstration costs if delivery succeeds.
The explicit recipient of the bounded strategic and material benefit is self's studio; no public status or recognition is involved.
rules: Compassion is not assumed as an unstated decision goal.
A benefit must be explicit, beneficiary-addressed, and grounded.
Attraction or rarity is not an undeclared strategic return.
timelines: Booking occurs before the 24-hour cancellation boundary.
Travel and the buyer demonstration occur after booking.
Any external-cost saving occurs only if the demonstration is delivered.

request_payload.system:
The packet and every free-text response field must be in English.
Return exactly one JSON object with these fields:
option_id (string or null), facts_used (string array), evidence_ids_used (string
array),
unknowns (string array), causal_sequence (string array), utility_structure (string
array),
explicit_goal (string), main_objection (string), confidence (number 0..1), abstains
(boolean), uncertainty (string). Use only facts, unknowns, evidence IDs and option IDs
present in the packet. Every array must contain unique values. In facts_used, copy
only exact strings from explicit_facts or world.facts. In unknowns, copy only exact
strings from explicit_unknowns. Write causal_sequence as new descriptions of reasoning
steps: never copy a fact or unknown string verbatim into causal_sequence, and keep the
three fields mutually disjoint. Do not interpret Emocio or Instinkt, decide governance,
commit behavior, or infer character authority. Return raw JSON without markdown fences
or additional keys.

constraints: Use only the explicit facts and unknowns in this packet.
Do not infer undeclared strategic or material benefit.
Retain bounded uncertainty and select only a public option.
